assumptions: The externally supplied Candidate A compilation and package digest pair is the trusted prior admission result; this preparation specialist bound that pair but did not recompute the domain-separated identities.
risks: Any source mutation after this handoff invalidates the source bindings and requires a new preparation attempt.
This preparation authenticates source identity only; product/API, algorithm/lifecycle, and security/trace conclusions remain owned by independent downstream reviewers.
followUps: Preserve this raw handoff and its inline review-candidate-digests.json content verbatim as revision-23 preparation evidence.
Independent downstream reviewers must use the exact admitted candidate digest pair and authenticated source set recorded here.
